segments.text: Robot's attack versatility is definitely one of its biggest charms as a fighter
segments.original_text: 攻撃が非常に多彩なのもこのロボットというファイターの魅力の一つ

segments.text: Down tilt to pressure, hydrant out, sourspot bair!
segments.original_text: 下強で固めて消火栓出したところに空中後ろ根当たり

segments.text: This move can secure a KO even from center stage on Pokemon Stadium 2!
segments.original_text: ステージ中央からポケモンスタジアム2でも撃墜が可能なこの技

full_text: Robot's attack versatility is definitely one of its biggest charms as a fighter Down tilt to pressure, hydrant out, sourspot bair! This move can secure a KO even from center stage on Pokemon Stadium 2!
